name: harness
description: Project-agnostic AI coding harness — global governance hooks (guards + injects) + a GLOBAL slash-command set (commands/) that wire the `harness` CLI into Claude Code, the plugin-equivalent of a per-repo settings.json install. Commands live here once (shared set · no per-project copy). Requires `harness` on PATH (install: clone dancinlab/harness to ~/.harness/cli + symlink bin/harness into ~/.local/bin).
